_comment: Source of truth for all hosting providers and data services supported by Astropress. Every entry in AstropressAppHost and AstropressDataServices must appear here. audit:providers (tooling/scripts/audit-providers.ts) enforces this. To add a new provider: add it here first with a verified URL, then add it to the type system.

appHosts.label: GitHub Pages
appHosts.notes: Free static hosting for public repos. No server runtime.

appHosts.label: Cloudflare Pages
appHosts.notes: Free tier. Static + edge runtime via Workers. D1 and R2 available.

appHosts.label: Vercel
appHosts.notes: Hobby tier is free but non-commercial only. Pro required for commercial use.

appHosts.label: Netlify
appHosts.notes: Free tier available. Serverless functions supported.

appHosts.label: Render Static Site
appHosts.notes: Free static site hosting on Render.

appHosts.label: Render Web Service
appHosts.notes: Paid web service tier. Node runtime.

appHosts.label: GitLab Pages
appHosts.notes: Free static hosting for GitLab repos. No server runtime.

appHosts.label: Fly.io
appHosts.notes: Usage-based billing. Docker/VM-based. Deploy with flyctl.

appHosts.label: Coolify
appHosts.notes: Open-source self-hosted PaaS. Deploy via git push or Docker Compose.

appHosts.label: DigitalOcean App Platform
appHosts.notes: Paid. Managed container and static hosting.

appHosts.label: Railway
appHosts.notes: Usage-based billing. No ongoing free tier (trial credits only). Container platform.

dataServices.label: No Hosted Content Services
dataServices.notes: Static path. No hosted Astropress admin backend.

dataServices.label: Cloudflare D1 / R2 / Workers
dataServices.notes: D1 (SQLite-edge database), R2 (object storage), Workers (runtime). Free tier available.

dataServices.label: Supabase
dataServices.notes: Hosted Postgres, object storage, and auth. Free tier available. Server-side only — use service role key.

dataServices.label: Appwrite
dataServices.notes: Open-source BaaS: database, storage, auth, and functions. Cloud and self-hosted.

dataServices.label: Neon
dataServices.notes: Serverless Postgres. Database only — no object storage or auth.

dataServices.label: Nhost
dataServices.notes: Open-source BaaS built on Hasura, PostgreSQL, and MinIO. Cloud and self-hosted.

dataServices.label: Turso (LibSQL)
dataServices.notes: Distributed SQLite (LibSQL protocol). Database only — no object storage or auth.

dataServices.label: Custom Content Services
dataServices.notes: User-supplied data, auth, and storage implementation.
